title: Status SREMSOC  Remote Control Socket
features: Converts electrical appliances to remote control on/off operation
Turns appliances on and off at the click of a button
Great for those hard to reach sockets
description: Product Description Status remote control socket turns appliances on and off at the click of a button. Converts electrical appliances to remote control on/off operation. Great for those hard to reach sockets. Simple and easy to use. No installation required. Plug and Play operation. 20 metre clear range. Comes with glossy retail box in white counter  display unit (CDU). Box Contains 1 x Remote Control Socket
